summary: Fantastic Frost performance remembered fondly, but recording source and quality are not specified
review: Both reviewers were present at the May‑day concert at the Frost Amphitheater and describe it as a fantastic show. No details about the audio source or sound quality are provided, so the technical aspects remain unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers gave 5‑star ratings and praised the show, indicating a very strong performance; however, the lack of any recording‑quality commentary limits confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer mentioned soundboard, audience, or any audio characteristics; therefore the technical quality cannot be assessed.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Attendees recall a beautiful May day at Frost and label the entire concert as fantastic, suggesting a consistently strong performance throughout.
